question: Main Gaza ke liye Alkhidmat Foundation ko kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Aap Meezan Bank account 02140100861151 ke zariye donate kar sakte hain, cash pick-up number 0800-44448 par call karke, Collection Centers par jaa kar, ya online debit/credit card ke zariye unki website alkhidmat.org/donate se.

question: Kya Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan mein tax-exempt hai?
expected_answer: Haan, Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan FBR Act 2(36)c ke tehat tax-exempt hai.

question: Alkhidmat Foundation ka head office kahan hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation ka head office 3km Khayaban-e-Jinnah, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan mein hai.

question: Main Alkhidmat Foundation se mazeed maloomat ke liye kaise rabta kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Aap unse phone +92 42 3802 0222 par ya email info@alkhidmat.org par raabta kar sakte hain.

question: Main Alkhidmat Foundation se donation receipt kaise hasil kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Aap apna transaction slip WhatsApp par +923000776016 bhej kar donation receipt le sakte hain.

question: Kaunse online donation tareeqay dastiyab hain?
expected_answer: Aap website par debit/credit card, online banking, bank transfer, JazzCash, EasyPaisa, ya home collection ke zariye donate kar sakte hain.

question: Kya main internationally Alkhidmat Foundation ko donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Haan, aap duniya ke kisi bhi kone se debit/credit cards ke zariye Alkhidmat Foundation ki website se donate kar sakte hain.

question: Alkhidmat Foundation ke abhi kaunse emergency appeals chal rahe hain?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation abhi emergency appeals jaise ke Bano Qabil aur Palestine Emergency Appeal chala rahi hai.

question: Alkhidmat Foundation ke main focus areas kya hain?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Foundation ka focus humanitarian services par hai, jaise ke health, education, disaster relief, women philanthropy, aur social welfare programs, 1990 se.

question: Main in-person donation kaise kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Aap in-person donation kisi bhi Alkhidmat Foundation ke Collection Center par ya directly unke head office Lahore mein jaa kar kar sakte hain.

question: Main Palestine ke liye Alkhidmat Foundation ko kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: General donations ke liye, Meezan Bank account 02140100861151 (IBAN: PK35MEZN0002140100861151) use karein. Zakat ke liye Meezan Bank account 02140101095120 (IBAN: PK94MEZN0002140101095120) use karein. Dono accounts Branch R1 Johar Town, Lahore mein hain, SWIFT code: MEZNPKKA. Aap Palestine ke liye unhi channels ya donation website se donate kar sakte hain.

question: Main ghar se Alkhidmat Foundation ko kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Aap cheques ya bank drafts jo 'Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan' ke naam par hon ke zariye donate kar sakte hain. Ghar se pick-up ke liye 0800 44 44 8 ya 0304 111 4 222 par call karein, representative aapke ghar se collect kar lega.

question: Kya main apna donation cheque courier se Alkhidmat Foundation bhej sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Haan, aap apna cheque ya bank draft courier ke zariye Alkhidmat Complex, 3km Khayaban-e-Jinnah, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan bhej sakte hain.

question: Main general USD donation Alkhidmat Foundation ko kaise kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: General USD donations ke liye Makramah Bank account 1994426252333135802 (IBAN: PK32SUMB9944293330135802) ya Meezan Bank account 0100643642 (IBAN: PK40MEZN0002010100643642) use karein. Dono banks Lahore, Pakistan mein hain, SWIFT codes: SUMBPKKA (Makramah) aur MEZNPKKA (Meezan).

question: Main USD Zakat Orphan/Aghosh, Community Services, ya Bano Qabil ke liye kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: USD Zakat donations ke liye Meezan Bank account 0100643642 (IBAN: PK40MEZN0002010100643642) use karein. Aap Orphan/Aghosh, Community Services, ya Bano Qabil ke liye donate kar sakte hain. SWIFT code: MEZNPKKA.

question: Main USD specific programs jaise ke Wash, Health, Education, Rebuild Palestine, ya Alkhidmat Islamic Microfinance ke liye kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: In programs ke USD donations ke liye Makramah Bank account 1994426252333135802 (IBAN: PK32SUMB9944293330135802) ya Meezan Bank account 0100643642 (IBAN: PK40MEZN0002010100643642) use karein. SWIFT codes: SUMBPKKA (Makramah) aur MEZNPKKA (Meezan).

question: Main general GBP donation Alkhidmat Foundation ko kaise kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: General GBP donations ke liye Makramah Bank account 1994426253402135802 (IBAN: PK02SUMB994434020135802) ya Meezan Bank account 0100644437 (IBAN: PK12MEZN0002010100644437) use karein. SWIFT codes: SUMBPKKA (Makramah) aur MEZNPKKA (Meezan).

question: Main GBP Zakat Orphan/Aghosh, Community Services, Bano Qabil, ya Clean Water ke liye kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: GBP Zakat donations ke liye Meezan Bank account 0100644437 (IBAN: PK12MEZN0002010100644437) use karein for Orphan/Aghosh, Community Services, Bano Qabil, ya Clean Water. SWIFT code: MEZNPKKA.

question: Main GBP specific programs jaise Health Collection, Education, Rebuild Palestine, ya Alkhidmat Islamic Microfinance ke liye kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: In programs ke liye GBP donations Makramah Bank account 1994426253402135802 (IBAN: PK02SUMB994434020135802) ya Meezan Bank account 0100644437 (IBAN: PK12MEZN0002010100644437) se kar sakte hain. SWIFT codes: SUMBPKKA (Makramah) aur MEZNPKKA (Meezan).

question: Main general EURO donation Alkhidmat Foundation ko kaise kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: General EURO donations ke liye Makramah Bank account 1994426254974135802 (IBAN: PK90SUMB9944319740135802) ya Meezan Bank account 0100644443 (IBAN: PK44MEZN0002010100644443) use karein. SWIFT codes: SUMBPKKA (Makramah) aur MEZNPKKA (Meezan).

question: Main EURO Zakat Orphan/Aghosh, Community Services, Bano Qabil, ya Clean Water ke liye kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: EURO Zakat donations ke liye Meezan Bank account 0100644437 (IBAN: PK44MEZN0002010100644443) use karein for Orphan/Aghosh, Community Services, Bano Qabil, ya Clean Water. SWIFT code: MEZNPKKA.

question: Main EURO specific programs jaise Health Collection, Education, Rebuild Palestine, ya Alkhidmat Islamic Microfinance ke liye kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: In programs ke liye EURO donations Makramah Bank account 1994426254974135802 (IBAN: PK90SUMB9944319740135802) ya Meezan Bank account 0100644437 (IBAN: PK44MEZN0002010100644443) se kar sakte hain. SWIFT codes: SUMBPKKA (Makramah) aur MEZNPKKA (Meezan).

question: Kya saari international donations ke liye bank transfer mein SWIFT code zaroori hai?
expected_answer: Haan, saari international donations USD, GBP, ya EURO mein SWIFT code ke zariye ki jati hain: SUMBPKKA (Makramah Bank) aur MEZNPKKA (Meezan Bank).

question: Main general PKR donation Alkhidmat Foundation ko kaise kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: General PKR donations ke liye Bank of Punjab (Taqwa Islamic Banking) account 5310067845100016 (IBAN: PK19BPUN5310067845100016, SWIFT: BPUNPKKA) ya website par listed other banks use karein.

question: Main PKR Zakat Orphan Care, Community Services, ya Bano Qabil ke liye kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: PKR Zakat donations ke liye Meezan Bank account 0101098699, Bank Alfalah account 5527005002305295, Bank of Punjab account 5470067845100026, ya Habib Metropolitan Bank account 6998129314714109745 use karein. SWIFT codes aur IBAN har bank ke liye available hain.

question: Main PKR specific programs jaise Disaster Management, Health, Education, WASH, ya Alkhidmat Islamic Microfinance ke liye kaise donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Disaster Management ke liye Soneri Bank account 20001287371, Health/WASH ke liye MCB Islamic Bank account 0651000583520002 ya 0651000583520004, Education ke liye National Bank account 2132003312806715, Alkhidmat Islamic Microfinance ke liye Bank of Punjab account 5470067845100015 ya Habib Metropolitan Bank account 6998129314714109745 use karein. SWIFT codes aur IBAN har bank ke liye available hain.

question: Health ya Education programs ke liye PKR Zakat ke liye kaunse accounts use honge?
expected_answer: Health ke liye MCB Islamic Bank account 0651000583520002 aur Education ke liye National Bank of Pakistan account 2132003312806715 ya Bank Islami Pakistan Limited account 0205215724660136 use karein. SWIFT codes aur IBAN available hain.

question: Community Services ke liye PKR donations kaise diye ja sakte hain?
expected_answer: Community Services ke liye PKR donations Meezan Bank account 0101034665 ya Bank Alfalah account 55275001586959 se kiye ja sakte hain. SWIFT codes: MEZNPKKA aur ALFHPKKA527.

question: Bano Qabil PKR donations aur Zakat ke liye kaunse accounts hain?
expected_answer: Bano Qabil ke liye PKR donations ke liye Bank of Punjab account 5470067845100026 (Zakat) ya Habib Metropolitan Bank account 6998129314714109745 (Donation) use karein. SWIFT codes: BPUNPKKA aur MPBLPKKA.

question: WASH programs ke liye PKR donations kaise diye ja sakte hain?
expected_answer: WASH programs ke liye PKR donations MCB Islamic Bank account 0651000583520004 se kiye ja sakte hain. SWIFT code: MUCBPKKA.

question: Alkhidmat Islamic Microfinance programs ke liye PKR donations kaise diye ja sakte hain?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Islamic Microfinance ke liye PKR donations Bank of Punjab account 5470067845100015 ya Habib Metropolitan Bank account 6998129314714109745 se kiye ja sakte hain. SWIFT codes: BPUNPKKA aur MPBLPKKA.

question: Tameer-e-Watan PKR donations ke liye kaunse account use karna chahiye?
expected_answer: Tameer-e-Watan ke liye PKR donations Meezan Bank account 0100644443 se kiye ja sakte hain. SWIFT code: MEZNPKKA.

question: Orphan Care ke liye PKR Zakat kaise donate karein?
expected_answer: Orphan Care ke liye PKR Zakat Meezan Bank account 0101098699 ya Bank Alfalah account 5527005002305295 se di ja sakti hai. SWIFT codes: MEZNPKKA aur ALFHPKKA.

question: Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan ke President kaun hain aur unke kya roles hain?
expected_answer: Prof. Dr. Hafeez ur Rahman Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan ke President hain. Wo Alkhidmat Global Committee ke Convener bhi hain aur AHF Coordination ke zimmedar hain.

question: Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan ke Vice Presidents kaun hain?
expected_answer: Vice Presidents mein Mr. M. Abdus Shakoor, Syed Ihsan Ullah Waqas, Dr. M. Mushtaq Ahmed Mangat, Mr. Aijaz Ullah Khan, Mr. Zikrullah Mujahid, Air Marshal (R) Farooq Habib, Mr. Abrar Ahmed Maggu, A.M. (R) Arshad Mahmood Malik, aur Ms. Saima Shabbir shamil hain.

question: Secretary General aur Chief Executive Officers ke key administrative positions kaun sambhalte hain?
expected_answer: Key administrative positions mein Mr. Syed Waqas Jafri (Secretary General AKFP), Mr. Mirza Munawar Hussain (Secretary Finance AKFP), aur Chief Executive Officers jaise Mr. Shahid Iqbal (Bano Qabil Pakistan), Mr. Khubaib Bilal (AKFP), aur Mr. Sufyan Ahmad Khan (AHF) shamil hain.

question: Women Wing aur Finance ko kaun manage karta hai Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan mein?
expected_answer: Ms. Samia Salman Women Wing Pakistan ki General Secretary hain, aur Mr. Ateeque Rasheed Group Chief Financial Officer hain.

question: Alkhidmat ka main contact address kahan hai?
expected_answer: Contact address: Place 501, Quaideen Colony, Near Islamia College, Karachi, Pakistan.

question: Alkhidmat ke liye contact phone numbers kya hain?
Alkhidmat Karachi ne youth ko support karne ke liye kaunsa education initiative launch kiya?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat Karachi ne youth ko support karne ke liye 'Bano Qabil' education initiative launch kiya.

question: Bano Qabil program ke courses ki duration kya hai?
expected_answer: Courses 4 se 6 months ke hote hain.

question: Bano Qabil ke under selected students kaunse courses choose kar sakte hain?
expected_answer: Students Web Development, App Development, Digital Marketing, Graphic Designing, Freelancing, aur Amazon FBA Virtual Assistant choose kar sakte hain.

question: Bano Qabil program ke liye kitne candidates register huye?
expected_answer: Program ke mobile app aur website ke zariye 75,000 se zyada candidates register huye.

question: Bano Qabil program kya hai?
expected_answer: Bano Qabil Alkhidmat Karachi ka education initiative hai jo 100% free advanced IT courses provide karta hai taake youth skills develop kar sake employment aur freelancing ke liye.

question: Main online donate karne ke liye kaunsi website use karoon?
expected_answer: Aap ye link open karke donate kar sakte hain: 'https://alkhidmat.com/donate/'

question: Kya aap mujhe online donation process guide kar sakte hain?
expected_answer: Online donate karne ke liye, pehle Quick Donate par click karein aur Decide karein Give Once ya Give Regularly. Next, PKR amount select karein preset amounts (5,000, 10,000, 25,000, 50,000) ya custom type karke. Phir Sadqa/Zakat dropdown select karein aur Donate par click karein. Form mein full name, email, phone, country, city aur optional address enter karein. Finally payment method choose karein—Card Online, Direct Bank Transfer, ya Collect from Home—and donation complete karein.

question: Main kahan donate kar sakta hoon ya kaunse causes ke liye Alkhidmat ko donate kar sakta hoon?
expected_answer: Aap Quick Donate option se ek martaba ya regular PKR donation de sakte hain. Causes mein emergency appeals (rebuilding Gaza), general donations (Sadaqah/Zakat), orphan care aur Aghosh Homes sponsorships, healthcare services (CT scan, MRI, surgeries, ambulances, blood banks, hospitals), community services (food packages, Dastarkhawan, sewing machines, Ramadan aur winter packages), minority welfare, prisoner relief, masjid rehabilitation aur bohot se humanitarian aur social welfare projects shamil hain.

question: Alkhidmat ka Wash Program kya hai aur ye kyun important hai?
expected_answer: Wash Program clean aur affordable drinking water provide karta hai. Ye important hai kyun ke Pakistan water-deficient country ban raha hai aur duniya ke 30th most water-deficient countries mein shamil hai.

question: Alkhidmat Wash Program ke zariye clean water kaise provide karta hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat urban areas mein water filtration plants chalata hai aur remote regions jaise Thar Desert mein water pumps install karta hai.

question: Alkhidmat ka Orphan Care Program traditional orphanages se kaise different hai?
expected_answer: Traditional orphanages ke bajaye, Alkhidmat modern boarding school system chalata hai jahan orphans ko quality education aur care milti hai.

question: Aghosh Orphan Centers kya hain aur kahan hain?
expected_answer: Aghosh Orphan Centers Alkhidmat ke boarding schools hain orphans ke liye. Total 11 centers hain, including Turkey mein Syrian refugee children ke liye.

question: Orphan Family Support Program ke under kya support provide ki jati hai?
expected_answer: Program un orphans ko support karta hai jo apni mother ya relatives ke saath rehte hain, educational aur health support ke saath unki mother/guardian ke liye assistance aur education provide karta hai.

question: Community services Alkhidmat ke liye kyun important focus hain?
expected_answer: Community services important hain kyun ke Pakistan mein poverty widespread hai, basic facilities ki kami hai, aur Human Development Index mein 154th rank hai, aur population ka 51% basic necessities se deprived hai.

question: Alkhidmat kaunse types ke community services provide karta hai?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat food centers, wheelchairs distribution, aur affordable funeral bus services provide karta hai.

question: Mawakhat Program ka purpose kya hai?
expected_answer: Mawakhat Program low-income individuals ke liye small interest-free loans offer karta hai jo easy installments mein repay hote hain.

question: Kaunse businesses Mawakhat Program se benefit hua hain?
expected_answer: Beneficiaries ne tailoring shops, garment making units, hardware stores, general stores, auto rickshaws, food stalls, bakeries, online clothing businesses aur boutiques establish kiye hain.

question: Disasters ke doran Alkhidmat ka kya role hai Pakistan mein?
expected_answer: Alkhidmat volunteers relief aur rescue operations mein actively participate karte hain aur 2005 Kashmir earthquake aur Awaran, Balochistan emergencies mein major relief efforts kiye hain.
